metadata.name: Promise of Power: normal cast then entwine cast
metadata.description: Demonstrates CR 702.42 Entwine with two sequential casts of Promise of Power. First cast chooses only Mode 0 (draw 5, lose 5 life) without paying the entwine cost. Second cast pays the entwine additional cost {4}, executing both modes: draw 5 cards and lose 5 life AND create a 5/5 black Demon token with flying. Verifies that entwine_paid=false executes only the selected mode, while entwine_paid=true executes all modes.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.42a: Entwine is an additional cost that lets the player choose all modes of a modal spell. Promise of Power has Mode 0 (draw 5, lose 5 life) and Mode 1 (create X/X Demon token). The card def uses a fixed 5/5 placeholder for the Demon token since TokenSpec uses fixed i32 for P/T; true oracle text has X = hand size at resolution. Cast 1 (normal): p1 starts with 2 Promise of Power in hand; casts one (hand=1) → draws 5 (hand=6) → loses 5 life (life=35). Cast 2 (entwine): p1 has 6 cards in hand; casts one (hand=5) → draws 5 (hand=10) → loses 5 life (life=30) → Demon token created on battlefield. Mana pool is set generously to cover both casts: {2}{B}{B}{B} = 2 generic + 3 black for cast 1; {2}{B}{B}{B}+{4} = 6 generic + 3 black for cast 2; total = colorless:8, black:6 (but reusing remaining pool across both casts since no phase change resets the pool). After cast 1 uses generic:2 + black:3, pool has colorless:6 + black:3 left for cast 2 which needs generic:6 + black:3. Library has 10 Islands so two draw-5 effects succeed.

script.step_note: Cast 1: Promise of Power without entwine (Mode 0 only — draw 5, lose 5 life)

actions.description: Initial: p1 has 2 Promise of Power in hand, 40 life

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Promise of Power paying {2}{B}{B}{B}. Mode 0 selected (draw 5, lose 5 life). Entwine cost not paid.

actions.description: After casting: Promise of Power on stack, hand has 1 card
actions.note: Promise of Power moved from hand to stack; one copy remains in hand.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Mode 0 resolves — p1 draws 5 cards.
CR 118.2: Mode 0 continues — p1 loses 5 life. Life goes from 40 to 35.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Promise of Power resolves; Mode 0 effect executes (draw 5, lose 5 life); card moves to graveyard.

actions.description: After cast 1 resolves: p1 life=35, hand has 6 cards (1 remaining + 5 drawn), no Demon token, stack empty
actions.note: p1 went from 40 to 35 life; drew 5 from library giving hand count 1+5=6. No Demon token — entwine not paid.

script.step_note: Cast 2: Promise of Power with Entwine (both modes — draw 5/lose 5 life AND create Demon token)

actions.note: CR 702.42a: p1 casts Promise of Power paying {2}{B}{B}{B} base cost plus {4} entwine additional cost (total {6}{B}{B}{B}). Both modes are chosen.

actions.description: After casting with entwine: Promise of Power on stack, hand has 5 cards
actions.note: Second Promise of Power moved from hand to stack; hand drops from 6 to 5.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Entwine — Mode 0 resolves first: p1 draws 5 cards.
CR 118.2: Mode 0 continues — p1 loses 5 life. Life goes from 35 to 30.
CR 111.1: Mode 1 resolves — create a 5/5 black Demon token with flying under p1's control.

actions.note: CR 702.42a: With entwine paid, both modes execute. Mode 0: draw 5 + lose 5 life. Mode 1: create Demon token.

actions.description: After cast 2 resolves: p1 life=30, hand has 10 cards, 1 Demon token on battlefield, stack empty
actions.note: p1 life: 35-5=30. Hand: 5 cards before cast 2 resolution, drew 5 = 10. Demon token created on battlefield via entwine Mode 1.
